entities.name: GFSAD CROP DOMINANCE DATASET
entities.description: A global 1 km resolution dataset providing information on crop dominance for the year 2010.

entities.name: AVHRR
entities.description: Advanced Very High Resolution Radiometer used for remote sensing data input.

entities.name: SPOT VEGETATION
entities.description: Satellite Probatoire d'Observation de la Terre vegetation remote sensing data input.

entities.name: MODIS
entities.description: Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectrometer remote sensing data input.

entities.name: CROP TYPE DATA
entities.description: Data regarding the types of crops used as input for the dataset.

entities.name: SECONDARY ELEVATION DATA
entities.description: Elevation data used as a secondary input for the dataset.

entities.name: PRECIPITATION
entities.description: 50-year precipitation data used as an environmental input.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: 20-year temperature data used as an environmental input.

entities.name: GROUND DATA
entities.description: Reference sub-meter to 5-meter resolution ground data used for validation or input.

entities.name: COUNTRY STATISTIC DATA
entities.description: Statistical data at the country level used as input.

entities.name: DOMINANT CROPS
entities.description: The five dominant crops of the world used to produce the dominance data.

entities.name: IRRIGATED AND RAINFED CROPLAND AREA MAP
entities.description: A remote sensing derived global map of irrigated and rainfed cropland area.

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL WATER MANAGEMENT INSTITUTE
entities.description: The organization (IWMI) that produced the global irrigated and rainfed cropland area map.

entities.name: CROP DOMINANCE CLASSES
entities.description: The eight classes of crop dominance created as the final output of the GFSAD1KCD.

relationships.source: IRRIGATED AND RAINFED CROPLAND AREA MAP

relationships.target: IRRIGATED AND RAINFED CROPLAND AREA MAP
